name: Victorian Jewels
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinade the fruits and raisins in brandy or apple juice overnight.
2. Cream together sugar, butter, and egg until smooth.
3. Sift dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, salt) into the creamed mixture and stir until just combined.
4. Add walnuts and marinaded fruits to the batter. Mix well.
5. Spoon batter into 1 3/4 inch mini-muffin tins lined with baking cups. Fill each tin about 3/4 full.
6. Top each muffin with a cherry or walnut half.
7. Bake at 300 degrees F for 30 minutes, rotating the pan halfway through cooking time.
8. Remove from tins and brush tops with more brandy or juice while warm.
9. Cool completely before serving.
10. Store in an airtight container.
11. Before serving, brush tops with melted jelly.
